image_prompt: SVG: three plant cells side-by-side — Hypotonic/Turgid (water flowing in, vacuole large), Isotonic/Flaccid (water moving both ways, vacuole slightly shrunken), Hypertonic/Plasmolyzed (water flowing out, protoplast shrunken away from cell wall). Labels: H2O arrows, Vacuole, Turgid, Flaccid, Plasmolyzed.

SVG: left panel — marram grass on coastal dunes (sky, sand, grass tufts); right panel — leaf cross-section curled inward with thick waxy cuticle on outer surface, inner ridges of photosynthetic tissue, sunken stomata surrounded by hairs. Labels: Waxy cuticle, Position of stomata.
SVG: a vine plant tendril coiling repeatedly around a vertical wooden pole. Leaves at intervals, growing stem winding up the pole.

topic: Plant showing shoot and root growth (gravitropism)
image_prompt: SVG: a young plant with stem and leaves growing upward (negative gravitropism / positive phototropism) and extensive root system growing downward into soil (positive gravitropism).

topic: Mimosa pudica leaves open vs closed
image_prompt: SVG: Mimosa pudica leaves — left side open feathery pinnate leaflets, right side closed/folded leaflets after touch stimulus. Finger approaching from below.

SVG: tray of soil under a lamp (Light arrow) with five coleoptiles: Control (bends toward light), Tip removed (straight), Tip covered by opaque cap (straight), Tip covered by transparent cap (bends), Base covered by opaque shield (bends).

SVG: five identical cut-away cells laid out in a grid; each cell shows the cytoplasm, nucleus, ER, mitochondrion, Golgi apparatus and vesicles. In each panel a yellow circle highlights one organelle with a label line: Nucleus, Cytoplasm, Golgi apparatus, Mitochondria, Cell membrane.

SVG: Belgian Blue bull showing extreme double-muscled hindquarters, characteristic of selective breeding for muscle mass.
